description: Triggers when the user wants help with pricing decisions, packaging, monetization, tier structure, or willingness-to-pay research
should_trigger: Help me design pricing tiers for my SaaS product — I'm not sure whether to do freemium or free trial
What should I charge for my B2B tool? Competitors are at $49/month
I need to create a pricing page with Good/Better/Best tiers
How do I use Van Westendorp price sensitivity analysis for my product?
My conversion rate is too high — should I raise prices?
How do I choose the right value metric (per seat vs per usage) for my app?
I want to move from flat fee to usage-based pricing
should_not_trigger: How do I integrate Stripe into my Next.js app?
Design the UI for my pricing page
Help me write cold emails to enterprise prospects
Set up my payment gateway webhook
